Hand of the Maestro  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
AC: 5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +5 HP: +20 MANA: +30
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
AC: 5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +5 HP: +20 MANA: +30
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:unknown
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:07
Page Updated:Wed Apr 26th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Hate
NPC Name
Hand of the Maestro

Plane of Hate 2.0
NPC Name
Maestro of Rancor - Plane of Hate

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

East Freeport
Quest Name
Warrior Epic: Jagged Blade of War

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Hate
Drops from Maestro of Rancor pre Velious revamp. Drops from Hand of Maestro with Velious revamp.

Updated March 20th, 2022

If this is still up, it's still available.

I Hope that every warrior that reads this page .. that should be most of them since epic is a nice thing to have .. I have pegasus feathered cloak, and im not a mage. its fun to have, and I got lucky with the spawns so I have every right to own it. if some mage doesnt like it then they can pay me 30k and I would be glad to MQ it.

dont be so greedy guys, its really not a big deal, I was only one in zone when I got it so next time if it makes you feel better I will just let it rot in the ground.

# Jun 16 2009 at 6:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342275642
View User Forum
132 posts
I understand sarcasm is difficult to convey over the internet, but at the time of my post I had no intentions of selling the cloak. I said 30k for the sole purpose of making everyone reading my post informed that I was letting go of it.

also, if you are going to reply to my post, dont refer to me as he. that would be using the third person. since it is a reply to MY post, you should say "I like the way YOU said".

have a great day, Zameel!

I am a 57 warrior i find myself lucky to only need this part and sky to finish. I have some one that will MQ it for me but i need to know how it is done shurely dont want to mess things up... would be ugly 20k is to much for gds same with red one.
▲ Page top
Not asking for sympathy
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2003 at 4:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256949394
2 posts
My wife has a lvl 53 warrior on Veeshan. She has 5 itms left to finish her epic. Although, it's NOT her choice to have "cheated" so to speak by purchasing a couple of itms needed, she needs some assistance in obtaining the remaining itms. *We have a low end puter atm and a new one just isn't in our budget for at least another year. So, what I am asking is this...are there any of you guilds who have NO warriors or NO warriors needing the itms, that would consider sending her a tell and assisting her with them? We are very laggy in the new world zones, making it frustrating to attempt many of the itms needed.
Thanks for at least taking time to read this and "Ballaquesta" does NOT want sympathy. ONLY some assistance if anyone out there can help. She needs to obtain green dragon scales, hand of Maestro, ball of everliving golem, ancient blade, and spiroc wingblade to finish her quest. TY!
▲ Page top
RE: Not asking for sympathy
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2003 at 9:10 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591769094483
1 post
Just so you are aware...your wife needs to get the ancient blade off the queen herself. Everything else is MQable. Good luck on your quest.

QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2003 at 3:27 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593374966959
View User Forum
Scholar
91 posts
Got this while doing the chanter epic last week. There were only 5 of us: Ranger, Rogue, Cleric, Bard, and myself, Chanter. I looted it to hopefully MQ it for a warrior and wanted to ask if it is MQable or if I should just destroy it? It would have rotted anyway, so I wouldn't feel bad. Btw, before the flames start, there were only 5 of us in the zone so no warriors available to grab it.
▲ Page top
Yes, it is MQable
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2003 at 2:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760148599
169 posts
Bad thing is that with this War will need to give mark of the sword which is received by turning in red & green dragon scales & like with any MQ there is a chance it goes bad. Personally I wouldn't risk.
Now the flaming part: don't U know any warriors?! Send'em a tell! They will be helping U & Ur guild for the rest of there lives!

if its a upgrade to a enc/mg....then haldoarf..then why is your need any greater than theirs..so..its your epic...that describes your need and should get a chance at it...but saying you get it automaticly because it used in your epic is bs and you wouldnt have to ask to tl'ed out...you would have already been asked to leave and not invited again..hehehe you show the most greed..peeps use this epic excuse like its some holy quest that all should just bow out and let you get it...sorrry..we all pay the same money and just because your doing a quest dont make your need any greater than anyone elses

QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2006 at 11:06 PM Rating: Decent
Paylin
276 posts
lol... this is a hella old post.. but even then... in 2002... epics were some of the best weapons in the game... no matter how much of an upgrade it was for a mage or an enchanter... a guild or raid leader WOULD give it to the warrior working for the epic for the sole fact it was such a powerful weapon back then... people like you are the ones who complain about things sony breaks then complains when they fix them.. the ones who can never be pleased... you say this, but i bet if someone rolled on a piece of YOUR characters epic because it is wearable and was an upgrade for them, you'd complain and have them kicked from the raid.. i've seen it happen .. flame me for responding to an old post.. flame me because you dont agree ..
